title: Black Hole Sun
description:
Replaces the texture of the sun in Minecraft to a black hole.

Texture pack may show up as out of date for 1.21.1, it is not. Upload it directly into packs folder and it works just fine.
body:
Replaces the Sun with a black hole. 
Was made for personal use because there was not enough Sun retextures.

If you know a way to turn down the sun brightness/ allow more color through please let me know. 

PACK DOES NOT WORK WITH SHADERS THAT OVERRIDE SUN. OTHER SHADERS WORK JUST FINE.

NOTE: Does not work in 26.1.2+ I can not find a way to make resorce packs for this version, so until then it only works on versions before the 26+
